items.title: S01E01 - Planet 46
items.summary: After intercepting a missile on course for earth, Steve Zodiac and the crew of the XL5 travel to Planet 46 and discover the Subterrains who launch another missile at the earth with Venus trapped inside.

infolabels.title: Planet 46
infolabels.plot: After intercepting a missile on course for earth, Steve Zodiac and the crew of the XL5 travel to Planet 46 and discover the Subterrains who launch another missile at the earth with Venus trapped inside.

items.title: S01E02 - The Doomed Planet
items.summary: The Fireball XL5 narrowly misses a planet that bas broken out of it's orbit and realize the planet is on a collision course for the planet Membrono. After concluding the planets are uninhabited, Steve realizes he saw a flying saucer and after the ship lands at Venus' house, the XL5 is lured back to save the planet Membrono from destruction.

infolabels.title: The Doomed Planet
infolabels.plot: The Fireball XL5 narrowly misses a planet that bas broken out of it's orbit and realize the planet is on a collision course for the planet Membrono. After concluding the planets are uninhabited, Steve realizes he saw a flying saucer and after the ship lands at Venus' house, the XL5 is lured back to save the planet Membrono from destruction.

items.title: S01E03 - Space Immigrants
items.summary: Venus and Prof. Matic are about to set off in the Mayflower 3 to colonise the nearby planet, New Earth. But the Advance Scout has been kidnapped by two evil midgets who plan to hold the new immigrants captive.

infolabels.title: Space Immigrants
infolabels.plot: Venus and Prof. Matic are about to set off in the Mayflower 3 to colonise the nearby planet, New Earth. But the Advance Scout has been kidnapped by two evil midgets who plan to hold the new immigrants captive.

items.title: S01E04 - Plant Man From Space
items.summary: After a blackout at Space City, a missile gets through the radar blackout, and is heading towards Space City with a dangerous cargo...

infolabels.title: Plant Man From Space
infolabels.plot: After a blackout at Space City, a missile gets through the radar blackout, and is heading towards Space City with a dangerous cargo...

items.title: S01E05 - Spy in Space
items.summary: The crew of XL5 encounter Boris and Griselda the space pirates on the Companion 12 space station.

infolabels.title: Spy in Space
infolabels.plot: The crew of XL5 encounter Boris and Griselda the space pirates on the Companion 12 space station.

items.title: S01E06 - The Sun Temple
items.summary: When experimenting with a new warhead in space, Steve Zodiac is forced to save Venus from the clutches from the sinister Cult of Miras before she can be sacrificed to their sun-god...

infolabels.title: The Sun Temple
infolabels.plot: When experimenting with a new warhead in space, Steve Zodiac is forced to save Venus from the clutches from the sinister Cult of Miras before she can be sacrificed to their sun-god...

items.title: S01E07 - XL5 to H2O
items.summary: Everyone on planet Zolpheid is killed in an Aquaphibian attack, except for Rald and Jerek. Receiving an SOS, Space City sends Fireball XL5 to rescue the two from Zolpheid's oceans.

infolabels.title: XL5 to H2O
infolabels.plot: Everyone on planet Zolpheid is killed in an Aquaphibian attack, except for Rald and Jerek. Receiving an SOS, Space City sends Fireball XL5 to rescue the two from Zolpheid's oceans.

items.title: S01E08 - Space Pirates
items.summary: While babysitting Commander Zero's son, Jonathan, Venus tells him story about when Fireball XL5 encountered a group of space pirates.

infolabels.title: Space Pirates
infolabels.plot: While babysitting Commander Zero's son, Jonathan, Venus tells him story about when Fireball XL5 encountered a group of space pirates.

items.title: S01E09 - Flying Zodiac
items.summary: As Steve celebrates the anniversary of his family's circus act, Venus falls asleep and dreams of a plot devised by Mr and Mrs Space Spy and the nomadic Monadians to take over the Earth…

infolabels.title: Flying Zodiac
infolabels.plot: As Steve celebrates the anniversary of his family's circus act, Venus falls asleep and dreams of a plot devised by Mr and Mrs Space Spy and the nomadic Monadians to take over the Earth…

items.title: S01E10 - Space Pen
items.summary: To capture a group on criminals, Steve, Matt and Venus pretend to steal XL5.

infolabels.title: Space Pen
infolabels.plot: To capture a group on criminals, Steve, Matt and Venus pretend to steal XL5.

items.title: S01E11 - Space Monster
items.summary: Fireball XL2 has crashed on Planet Monotane, and Fireball XL5 is sent to investigate, only to run into a sort of space dinosaur...

infolabels.title: Space Monster
infolabels.plot: Fireball XL2 has crashed on Planet Monotane, and Fireball XL5 is sent to investigate, only to run into a sort of space dinosaur...

items.title: S01E12 - The Last of the Zanadus
items.summary: Major Jim Ireland returns to Earth after 10 years in space, but unknown to everyone, he has become an agent for Kudos, the only survivor from the planet Zanadu, who wants revenge on all Lazoones for destroying his people.

infolabels.title: The Last of the Zanadus
infolabels.plot: Major Jim Ireland returns to Earth after 10 years in space, but unknown to everyone, he has become an agent for Kudos, the only survivor from the planet Zanadu, who wants revenge on all Lazoones for destroying his people.

items.title: S01E13 - Planet of Platonia
items.summary: The Fireball XL5 foils an attempted bombing while transporting the King of Platonia and is caught in the middle of the plot to assassinate the King and sent two planets into war.

infolabels.title: Planet of Platonia
infolabels.plot: The Fireball XL5 foils an attempted bombing while transporting the King of Platonia and is caught in the middle of the plot to assassinate the King and sent two planets into war.

items.title: S01E14 - The Triads
items.summary: After detecting a series of massive explosions in space, Steve and the crew of XL5 find a planet three times bigger than Earth, but they soon crash land...

infolabels.title: The Triads
infolabels.plot: After detecting a series of massive explosions in space, Steve and the crew of XL5 find a planet three times bigger than Earth, but they soon crash land...

items.title: S01E15 - Wings of Danger
items.summary: On Planet 46, the Subterraineans plan revenge on Zodiac and send a robot bird to infect him with radium.

infolabels.title: Wings of Danger
infolabels.plot: On Planet 46, the Subterraineans plan revenge on Zodiac and send a robot bird to infect him with radium.

items.title: S01E16 - Convict in Space
items.summary: After top secret plans are stolen from Earth, XL5 enocunters Boris and Griselda, but Matt is captured.

infolabels.title: Convict in Space
infolabels.plot: After top secret plans are stolen from Earth, XL5 enocunters Boris and Griselda, but Matt is captured.

items.title: S01E17 - Space Vacation
items.summary: Kernak, ruler of Kemple plots the resettlement of his people to Planet Olympus by poisoning Olympus' ruler's son. Venus and Matt are captured and must be rescued by Steve.

infolabels.title: Space Vacation
infolabels.plot: Kernak, ruler of Kemple plots the resettlement of his people to Planet Olympus by poisoning Olympus' ruler's son. Venus and Matt are captured and must be rescued by Steve.

items.title: S01E18 - Flight to Danger
items.summary: Lt. 90 qualifies for his astronauts wings by landing XL5 in one piece and then piloting XL1 off the launch rail, but on his return to Earth in a capsule, he finds it has caught fire!

infolabels.title: Flight to Danger
infolabels.plot: Lt. 90 qualifies for his astronauts wings by landing XL5 in one piece and then piloting XL1 off the launch rail, but on his return to Earth in a capsule, he finds it has caught fire!

items.title: S01E19 - Prisoner on The Lost Planet
items.summary: Fireball XL5 recieves a distress call on a distant planet, and Steve Zodiac journeys to investigate.

infolabels.title: Prisoner on The Lost Planet
infolabels.plot: Fireball XL5 recieves a distress call on a distant planet, and Steve Zodiac journeys to investigate.

items.title: S01E20 - The Forbidden Planet
items.summary: At Space Observatory 1, Matt and Dr. Stamp work on a new Ultrascope space probe. However, the people of the planet the probe is sent to observe don't take too kindly to being watched and kidnap the scientists.

infolabels.title: The Forbidden Planet
infolabels.plot: At Space Observatory 1, Matt and Dr. Stamp work on a new Ultrascope space probe. However, the people of the planet the probe is sent to observe don't take too kindly to being watched and kidnap the scientists.

items.title: S01E21 - Robert to the Rescue
items.summary: While stargazing, Prof. Matic discovers a new planet, but it doesn't read on any electronic instruments. Curious, Steve and the others set out in the XL5 to investigate, and find that the planet is more sinister than first thought...

infolabels.title: Robert to the Rescue
infolabels.plot: While stargazing, Prof. Matic discovers a new planet, but it doesn't read on any electronic instruments. Curious, Steve and the others set out in the XL5 to investigate, and find that the planet is more sinister than first thought...

items.title: S01E22 - Dangerous Cargo
items.summary: On a survey of Pharos, the crew of XL5 disocver the planet is unstable and must be destroyed. After setting up bombs, someone traps Steve and the others in with it.

infolabels.title: Dangerous Cargo
infolabels.plot: On a survey of Pharos, the crew of XL5 disocver the planet is unstable and must be destroyed. After setting up bombs, someone traps Steve and the others in with it.

items.title: S01E23 - Mystery Of The TA2
items.summary: Whilst on patrol, the XL5 comes across the wreck of an old spaceship. Setting out to investigate, they find it to be the TA2, that disappeared in the 2020's, and the hunt is on to find her pilot...

infolabels.title: Mystery Of The TA2
infolabels.plot: Whilst on patrol, the XL5 comes across the wreck of an old spaceship. Setting out to investigate, they find it to be the TA2, that disappeared in the 2020's, and the hunt is on to find her pilot...

items.title: S01E24 - Drama At Space City
items.summary: With Steve and Venus on vacation, Commander Zero is left to look after Zoonie the Lazoon, who causes havoc in Space City with Commander Zeros' son, Jonathan.

infolabels.title: Drama At Space City
infolabels.plot: With Steve and Venus on vacation, Commander Zero is left to look after Zoonie the Lazoon, who causes havoc in Space City with Commander Zeros' son, Jonathan.

items.title: S01E25 - 1875
items.summary: Matt completes his new time machine and sends Robert back to 1875, but Steve, Venus and Zero are accidently sent back as well.

infolabels.plot: Matt completes his new time machine and sends Robert back to 1875, but Steve, Venus and Zero are accidently sent back as well.

items.title: S01E26 - The Granatoid Tanks
items.summary: On Planet 73, two scientists working at a mineral research lab discover that they in the path of six tanks controlled by Granatoid robots. They can only be stopped using a rare material, but all the supplies have run out!

infolabels.title: The Granatoid Tanks
infolabels.plot: On Planet 73, two scientists working at a mineral research lab discover that they in the path of six tanks controlled by Granatoid robots. They can only be stopped using a rare material, but all the supplies have run out!

items.title: S01E27 - The Robot Freighter Mystery
items.summary: Robot freighters are being sabotaged by a shoddy space salvage company, and Steve Zodiac is determined to find the proof he needs to bring the sleazy brothers to justice.

infolabels.title: The Robot Freighter Mystery
infolabels.plot: Robot freighters are being sabotaged by a shoddy space salvage company, and Steve Zodiac is determined to find the proof he needs to bring the sleazy brothers to justice.

items.title: S01E28 - Whistle for Danger
items.summary: On planet Floran, the crew of XL5 try to discover what is killing the plants there, however the native people believe they are an invasion force and drug their food.

infolabels.title: Whistle for Danger
infolabels.plot: On planet Floran, the crew of XL5 try to discover what is killing the plants there, however the native people believe they are an invasion force and drug their food.

items.title: S01E29 - Trial by Robot
items.summary: A mechanics professor is giving a lecture on robotics at Space City. But barely a few days after his visit, Robert suddenly rebels and steals Fireball XL1! Steve and Venus follow him in the XL5, but find themselves prisoner of a robotic society, with Robert as their jailer.

infolabels.title: Trial by Robot
infolabels.plot: A mechanics professor is giving a lecture on robotics at Space City. But barely a few days after his visit, Robert suddenly rebels and steals Fireball XL1! Steve and Venus follow him in the XL5, but find themselves prisoner of a robotic society, with Robert as their jailer.

items.title: S01E30 - A Day in the Life of a Space General
items.summary: While drawing a schematic for a new radar screen, Lt. Ninety is surprised to find himself promoted to the rank of General!

infolabels.title: A Day in the Life of a Space General
infolabels.plot: While drawing a schematic for a new radar screen, Lt. Ninety is surprised to find himself promoted to the rank of General!

items.title: S01E31 - Invasion Earth
items.summary: There is a strange fog descending on Space City, blocking out communications with the rest of the outside world. But what does this strange cloud hide?

infolabels.title: Invasion Earth
infolabels.plot: There is a strange fog descending on Space City, blocking out communications with the rest of the outside world. But what does this strange cloud hide?

items.title: S01E32 - Faster Than Light
items.summary: While on route to Space Station 9, Steve loses control of XL5. Racing out of control, XL5 passes the light barrier resulting in the loss of all but an hours worth of oxygen.

infolabels.title: Faster Than Light
infolabels.plot: While on route to Space Station 9, Steve loses control of XL5. Racing out of control, XL5 passes the light barrier resulting in the loss of all but an hours worth of oxygen.

items.title: S01E33 - The Day the Earth Froze
items.summary: XL27 makes an emergency landing at Space City and the crew are all found to be unconcious. XL27's route is traced back to planet Zavia where the inhabitants plan to freeze the Earth by deflecting the sun's rays.

infolabels.title: The Day the Earth Froze
infolabels.plot: XL27 makes an emergency landing at Space City and the crew are all found to be unconcious. XL27's route is traced back to planet Zavia where the inhabitants plan to freeze the Earth by deflecting the sun's rays.

items.title: S01E34 - The Fire Fighters
items.summary: Blazing fireballs from a space cloud cause widespread damage on Earth. XL5 is sent to investigate but it catches fire and has to retreat. Steve proposes using an old satellite to detonate the cloud, but a fireball is heading directly to Space City.

infolabels.title: The Fire Fighters
infolabels.plot: Blazing fireballs from a space cloud cause widespread damage on Earth. XL5 is sent to investigate but it catches fire and has to retreat. Steve proposes using an old satellite to detonate the cloud, but a fireball is heading directly to Space City.

items.title: S01E35 - Space City Special
items.summary: General Rossiter comes to Space City to present Steve with the Astronaut of the Year award. XL5 and the ground staff put on a song and dance show to raise money for charity. Meanwhile Venus is put in danger aboard a new supersonic jet liner.

infolabels.title: Space City Special
infolabels.plot: General Rossiter comes to Space City to present Steve with the Astronaut of the Year award. XL5 and the ground staff put on a song and dance show to raise money for charity. Meanwhile Venus is put in danger aboard a new supersonic jet liner.

items.title: S01E36 - Ghosts Of Space
items.summary: XL5 transports Geologist Frazer to Electron for a survey. When Frazer discovers a strange rock in a deserted town, he goes mad and threatens to destroy Fireball Junior, if Steve doesn't take the rocks back to Earth.

infolabels.title: Ghosts Of Space
infolabels.plot: XL5 transports Geologist Frazer to Electron for a survey. When Frazer discovers a strange rock in a deserted town, he goes mad and threatens to destroy Fireball Junior, if Steve doesn't take the rocks back to Earth.

items.title: S01E37 - Hypnotic Sphere
items.summary: The crew of the XL5 becomes entranced by a strange alien sphere and Robert is the only one who can save the crew.

infolabels.title: Hypnotic Sphere
infolabels.plot: The crew of the XL5 becomes entranced by a strange alien sphere and Robert is the only one who can save the crew.

items.title: S01E38 - Sabotage
items.summary: On patrol, Fireball XL5 suddenly catches fire. The cause, sabotage! Commander Zero sends Light Patrol LP22 to investigate, but the XL5 crew have disappeared...

infolabels.title: Sabotage
infolabels.plot: On patrol, Fireball XL5 suddenly catches fire. The cause, sabotage! Commander Zero sends Light Patrol LP22 to investigate, but the XL5 crew have disappeared...

items.title: S01E39 - Space Magnet
items.summary: The XL5 becomes caught in the gravitational pull of planet Megneton and discovers the plot by the Solars to bring the Earth's moon into their orbit.

infolabels.title: Space Magnet
infolabels.plot: The XL5 becomes caught in the gravitational pull of planet Megneton and discovers the plot by the Solars to bring the Earth's moon into their orbit.
